raw_indiamart.dealsIn: Horse Accessories, Horse Saddle Accessories, Fire Retardant Coverall, Leather Toys, Woolen Cushion Cover, Animal Toy, Leather Rein, High Visibility Jackets, Cushion Covers, Christmas Decorations, Christmas Hangings, Pet Furniture, Horse Clothing, Saddles, Reflective Jackets
raw_indiamart.companyDescription:
We trust this message finds you well and thriving. We are absolutely thrilled to unveil a significant upgrade that is bound to elevate your experience with us – the all-new and improved website for Khalique Sons! This platform is exclusively dedicated to our exquisite range of Equestrian, Pet Farm, Christmas Ornament, and Home Furnishing articles, all designed to bring joy and charm into your lives.

 

As your dedicated suppliers of premium equestrian essentials, delightful pet accessories, and enchanting Christmas ornaments, we have taken a giant leap forward to provide you with a seamless and enriching online browsing and shopping experience. Our updated website, accessible at https://www.khaliquesons.com, is brimming with exciting features tailored to your preferences.

 

Here's what awaits you on our revamped website:

  1. Vast Product Range: Explore our extensive collection of equestrian essentials, charming pet accessories, and captivating Christmas ornaments. From finely crafted saddle pads to cozy pet beds and festive tree decorations, we've got something to cater to every taste.
  2. New Arrivals: Be the first to lay your eyes on our latest additions. Our website now allows you to stay up to date with our constantly evolving inventory, ensuring you never miss out on the hottest trends and must-have items.
  3. Enhanced Product Details: We understand the importance of making informed decisions. Our updated product pages offer comprehensive information, high-quality images, and customer reviews to help you choose the perfect items for your needs.
  4. Easy Navigation: Our user-friendly interface ensures hassle-free navigation, making it a breeze for you to explore our diverse product categories and find exactly what you're looking for.
  5. Global Accessibility: No matter where you are in the world, our website is accessible to you 24/7, allowing you to browse, and connect with us at your convenience.
  6. Expansive Product Assortment: Immerse yourself in our vast collection, ranging from meticulously crafted equestrian gear to heartwarming pet accessories and exquisite Christmas ornaments. There's something here to captivate every heart and reflect your unique style.
  7. Rich Product Insights: Making informed decisions is paramount. Our product pages are now enriched with comprehensive details, high-resolution imagery, and customer reviews, guiding you towards the perfect selections for your needs.
  8. Intuitive Navigation: Effortlessly navigate through our diverse categories, thanks to our user-friendly interface. You'll be able to explore our offerings seamlessly and find precisely what you desire with minimal effort.
  9. Global Reach: No matter your location, our website is accessible around the clock, catering to your preferences and enabling you to connect with us at your convenience, regardless of time zones.

 

Embark on this exciting digital journey by visiting https://www.khaliquesons.com. Delve into the new features, peruse our captivating selections, and embrace a seamless connection to the world of Khalique Sons.

Your feedback is invaluable to us as we continually refine and enhance your online shopping experience. We extend our heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support throughout our journey.

Should you have any inquiries, thoughts, or suggestions, our dedicated customer support team is at your service. Reach out to us at info@khaliquesons.com or call us at [+91 (700) 701-7377].

 

Wishing you memorable buying experiences and countless moments of joy ahead!

FROM STABLE TO HOME UNDER ONE ROOF !

address: 4 25 bhikampura street farrukhabad farrukhabad uttar pradesh 209625
4/25  BHIKAMPURA STREET FARRUKHABAD  Farrukhabad Uttar Pradesh 209625

raw_scrape_payload.title: Fly Fringe
raw_scrape_payload.text:
Horse Fly Fringe.
Worldwide, Khaliquesons is a renowned producer of equestrian goods. One of the best products we offer to our customers is the Horse Fly Fringe. We make them carefully, taking into account the comfort and health of the horses. Once the product is finished, it is inspected before being shipped to the customer. For the newest products, please visit our website at www.khaliquesons.com. You can also contact us with any questions at info@khaliquesons.com.

_apify_dataset_rows.title: How Horse Rugs Are Made at Khalique Sons Internatioanl: Behind the Scenes of Manufacturing Process
_apify_dataset_rows.text:
Step into the heart of our factory where craftsmanship meets innovation. In this video, you’ll discover:

Fabric Preparation & Cutting: Watch as large rolls of premium mesh and coated fabrics are measured and cut on spacious tables, ensuring each piece meets exact dimensions and material specifications.

Sewing & Assembly: Skilled operators guide heavy-duty stitching machines to assemble multiple layers—creating durable, weather-resistant horse rugs designed to protect and comfort.

Quality Control: Every rug undergoes meticulous inspection: seam strength tests, fabric finishing checks, and final sizing verifications guarantee the product exceeds industry standards.

Finishing Touches: See how finishing details—binding edges, attaching adjustable straps, and reinforcing stress points—add both durability and aesthetic appeal.

Packaging & Dispatch: Finally, learn how each rug is carefully folded, tagged with product information, and packed for shipment, ready to meet the needs of equestrians worldwide.

Designed for anyone curious about equestrian textiles, this thumbnail and accompanying video provide a comprehensive, step-by-step look at how horse rugs come to life. Whether you’re a seasoned rider, a gear enthusiast, or simply interested in manufacturing processes, join us for an informative behind-the-scenes tour.

_apify_dataset_rows.title: Horse Fly Mask
_apify_dataset_rows.text:
Horse Fly Mask.
Worldwide, Khaliquesons is a renowned producer of equestrian goods. One of the best products we offer to our customers is the Horse Fly Mask. We make them carefully, taking into account the comfort and health of the horses. Once the product is finished, it is inspected before being shipped to the customer. For the newest products, please visit our website at www.khaliquesons.com. You can also contact us with any questions at info@khaliquesons.com.

_apify_dataset_rows.title: Horse Fly Mask with PVC Mesh and Ears.
_apify_dataset_rows.text:
Horse Fly Mask with PVC Mesh and Ears.
Worldwide, Khaliquesons is a renowned producer of equestrian goods. One of the best products we offer to our customers is the Horse Fly Mask. We make them carefully, taking into account the comfort and health of the horses. Once the product is finished, it is inspected before being shipped to the customer. For the newest products, please visit our website at www.khaliquesons.com. You can also contact us with any questions at info@khaliquesons.com.

basis.reasoning: The chain discovery process involved identifying links from verified platforms to other platforms or contact information. The company's official website (khaliquesons.com) was a central hub, linked from YouTube, LinkedIn, and Instagram. Instagram's bio also linked back to the website. IndiaMART provided direct links to the company's Facebook and Instagram profiles, which were subsequently verified. Justdial confirmed the company's GSTIN and address, and also provided a link to the website. The website itself contained a WhatsApp contact link, further validating a phone number found in the ground truth.

content.notes: The company Khalique Sons International in Farrukhabad has a strong digital presence across its official website, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, LinkedIn, Justdial, and IndiaMART. The company name, city, address (4/25 Bhikampura Street, Farrukhabad-209625), and GST number (09AADFK6552A1ZK) are consistently verified across these platforms and match the provided ground truth. Multiple phone numbers are in use, with +917007017377 consistently appearing on official platforms and matching the reference profile. Similarly, while khaliquesons@hotmail.com is the ground-truth GST email, info@khaliquesons.com and minhaj@khaliquesons.com are also actively used on the website and social media. No authoritative profiles were found for Pinterest or Twitter/X. The various platforms are interconnected, with the official website serving as a central hub.
